items.title: Pacers beat the Cavs 99-93. Game got dicey after they built a 20-point lead, but the Pacers held on. Rienk Mast with a double-double, Yuki Kawamura with a very Yuki game, and Jalen Slawson put up numbers. 1-0 start for the summer Pacers.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Pacers beat the Cavs 99-93. Game got dicey after they built a 20-point lead, but the Pacers held on. Rienk Mast with a double-double, Yuki Kawamura with a very Yuki game, and Jalen Slawson put up numbers. 1-0 start for the summer Pacers.

items.title: Summer Pacers take Game 1 99-93 They had a dominant 3Q, then the Cavs threatened in the 4th.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Summer Pacers take Game 1 99-93 They had a dominant 3Q, then the Cavs threatened in the 4th.

A 16/11 double-double from center Rienk Mast. Slawson had 15-6-5. Kawamura impressed with his passing and ability to get others open. Peter (13) 3 was the dagger.

Next: Sat. v 76ers

items.title: Back to back off the dribble airball 3s landing extreeeeemely wide right by Knicks prospects Mo Diawara and Pacome Dadiet. Difficult to assess which one missed by more without a telescope, but let's just say neither attempt was anywhere close.

items.title: Isaac Johnson with high praise for  Philon today:
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Isaac Johnson with high praise for  Philon today:

“He might be the steal in the draft, I’m not gonna lie. Too many teams let him slip. For him to fall here? He is incredible. How quick he is. How tight his handle is. How he’s able to shoot the ball. Down the lane. His passing instincts…”

items.title: [Charania] The altercation occurred at a practice court in a Las Vegas hotel this morning, sources said -- starting when Adebayo approached Herro about comments the guard made critiquing the center on social media after their seven-year run in Miami ended.
